{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sulthurus
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sulthurus]] has a burned half of his face.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sulthurus]] is a Fire Giant king.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
